name: Frances' Peanut Butter Treats
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Creamy or chunky peanut butter
2/3 Paraffin wax (the kind used for canning)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and peanut butter. Add confectioners sugar slowly and mix thoroughly.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls (no larger than an inch each) and place a toothpick in the center.
3. Melt the chocolate chips, then add the melted wax. Stir well until smooth. This can be done using the microwave or on the stove top. In the microwave, use glass dishes for best results, and melt the wax slowly. On the stove top, use a heavy saucepan and melt slowly to avoid burning the chocolate or the wax.
4. Dip the peanut butter balls into the chocolate and swirl them around to ensure they are completely covered.
5. Let the candy dry on a sheet of wax paper. Store in the refrigerator. These treats are perfect for serving with coffee and dessert, and I often include them in boxes of homemade assorted cookies for gift giving.
